text:
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The book "Deep Learning" (MIT Press, 2016) is a well-known, verifiable publication by Ian Goodfellow, Yoshua Bengio, and Aaron Courville — not "C. Wick" or published in "Informatik-Spektrum." The cited author list (with Yoshua Bengio duplicated) is slightly malformed, but three of the four cited authors are correct; the automated checker's "actual" metadata appears to have matched a different, unrelated paper with the same title. The real book exists at deeplearningbook.org and is widely catalogued.
LINK: https://www.deeplearningbook.org/
